title: Loukoumades with Greek Honey and Fresh Raspberries
description: A classic Greek dessert made with crispy fried dough balls topped with sweet honey and fresh raspberries.
instructions: Combine flour, yeast, and kefalograviera cheese in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add water and mix until dough comes together.
Knead dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Cover dough with plastic wrap and let rise for 1 hour.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
Fry dough balls in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain excess oil on paper towels.
Serve loukoumades warm with greek honey and fresh raspberries.
